---
description: "Review a proposed or completed SEMDL change by checking requirement fit and architecture consistency first, then stopgap design, unnecessary compatibility, complexity, symmetry, and missing coverage."
name: "Review SEMDL Change"
argument-hint: "Describe the change or list the files to review"
agent: "agent"
---
Review the provided SEMDL change and return specific issues or risks identified, residual risks, and the next step. If the change is incomplete or unclear, state what information is missing and what clarification is required.
